name: Banana Pudding Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 3/4 Cup reduced-calorie frozen whipped topping, thawed
4 Reduced-fat vanilla wafers, cut in half
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle wafer crumbs over the bottom of an 8-inch springform pan coated with vegetable cooking spray.
2. Beat cream cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy. Gradually add sugar, beating well. Add egg substitute and egg whites, beating until blended. Add sour cream and next three ingredients (banana cream pudding mix, skim milk, and vanilla extract), beating at low speed just until blended.
3. Pour mixture into prepared pan.
4. Bake at 300°F for 50 to 55 minutes. The center will be soft but will firm up when chilled.
5. Turn off the oven and partially open the door. Leave cheesecake in the oven for 20 minutes.
6. Remove cheesecake to a wire rack and run a knife around the edge of the pan. Cool on the wire rack.
7. Cover cheesecake and chill for 8 hours.
8. Remove sides of pan.
9. Toss bananas with lemon juice and arrange on top of the cake.
10. Pipe or spoon whipped topping around the edge and insert wafer halves into the topping.
Makes 12 servings.
